attempts.strategy: Explicit symmetric map_zero/map_add; tmul case via erw of the Mathlib μ-on-tmul lemma then the @[simp] characterisation, symmetrised.
attempts.code_tried:
| zero => rw [map_zero]; exact (map_zero _).symm
| tmul a b => erw [ModuleCat.restrictScalars_μ_tmul]; exact (restrictScalarsRingIsoTensorEquiv_apply_tmul e M₁ M₂ a b).symm
| add x y hx hy => rw [map_add, hx, hy]; exact (map_add _ x y).symm
attempts.insight: `erw` (not `rw`) is needed at restrictScalars_μ_tmul due to universe/instance elaboration. The pointwise-equality `hfun : ⇑μ = ⇑equiv` then gives bijectivity from LinearEquiv.bijective and IsIso via ConcreteCategory.isIso_iff_bijective. Verified axiom-clean: {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}.
